messages.content: "Mrs. Saigol ask me to get in touch with to ship this painting to Dubai" pls edit this
"Mrs. Saigol asked me to contact you regarding the shipment of this painting to Dubai."
"Please note that all your outfits are ready only two outfits are with the stitching team and they will be ready by Monday, won't be possible for us to change the trouser fabric" pls edit this

"Please be informed that all of your outfits are ready, except for two outfits which are currently with the stitching team. These two outfits will be ready by Monday. Regrettably, we won't be able to change the trouser fabric."

"As I have already informed you that your order will be ready by Tthe 20th of June. Please be informed that all of your outfits are ready, except for two outfits which are currently with the stitching team. These two outfits will be ready by Monday. Regrettably, we won’t be able to change the trouser fabric.” pls edit this

"As previously communicated, your order will be ready by the 20th of June. I would like to inform you that all of your outfits are now complete. However, please note that two outfits are still with the stitching team and will be ready by Monday. Unfortunately, we are unable to accommodate any change requests regarding the trouser fabric. Thank you for your understanding."
"Just got a message to post the ad once a week, can we post this twice a week" pls edit this
"I received a message requesting to post the ad once a week. Would it be possible to post it twice a week instead?"
"Thank you for sharing the ad, today I have received a message to post the ad once a week. Would it be possible to post it twice a week instead?”
"Thank you for sharing the ad with me. However, I have received a message today requesting that the ad be posted once a week. Is it feasible to increase the frequency to twice a week instead?"

"Hi, I am still waiting for your reply on the below mentioned email.
I hope this email finds you well.
I am reaching out to follow up on the email I previously sent you, concerning the updated statement and payments.
As you may recall, you mentioned in your response that your team would be contacting us soon. However, we have yet to receive a response from them.
As such, I would greatly appreciate it if you could kindly advise on the status of our inquiry. Should there be any further updates, please do not hesitate to inform us.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter" pls edit this

"Hello, 

I hope this message finds you doing well. I wanted to touch base regarding an email I had sent earlier, regarding an updated statement and payments. However, I have not received any response from your team yet despite you mentioning that they would be in touch with us soon.

As I'm still awaiting further information, I would appreciate it if you could update me on the current status of my inquiry. Please feel free to reach out to me with any updates or information as needed. Thank you for your help in this matter."
"Our person will be there tomorrow to cover this" pls edit this
"Our representative will be present tomorrow to cover this."
"Do we get paid for ads on Instagram ? Yes we get paid" pls edit this
"Do we receive payment for Instagram ads? Yes, we do."
"OK I will convey your message to her regarding this " pls edit this
"Alright, I will pass on your message to her regarding this."
"We have her measurements noted in our diary" pls edit this
"Her measurements have been recorded in our diary."

"Hello,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing in regards to the constant delay in the provision of the updated statement and payments.

We have reached out multiple times, requesting for the aforementioned details but have either received no response or been asked to wait.

We find it extremely unprofessional and a significant halt in terms of the progression of our work.

I hope you understand the nature of the issue and will provide the requested information at the earliest." Pls edit this

"Hello,

I hope this finds you well. 

I am writing to address the concerning delays in receiving the updated statement and corresponding payments. Despite our multiple attempts to inquire about the status of these details, we have either received no response or been asked to wait.

I must express our disappointment with the overall unprofessionalism demonstrated in this matter. The constant delays have significantly hindered our progress.

I kindly request you to take this matter seriously and provide the requested information as soon as possible. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter."

"I am writing in regards to the constant delay in the provision of the updated statement and payments.

We have reached out multiple times, requesting for the aforementioned details but have either received no response or been asked to wait.

We find it extremely unprofessional and a significant halt in terms of the progression of our work.

I hope you understand the nature of the issue and will provide the requested documents at the earliest." Pls edit this

"I am writing to address the ongoing delay in receiving the updated statement and payments we have been requesting. Despite our numerous inquiries, we have either received no response or been asked to keep waiting.

This situation is not only highly unprofessional but also causes significant disruption to our work progression.

I hope you understand the gravity of the situation and resolve this matter soon by providing the requested documents as soon as possible. Thank you for your prompt attention."
